mapper.sql: id, bom_case_id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, material_attr, material_spec, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, amount, `type`, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, is_delete, `status`
mapper.insert: insert into pl_bom_node (bom_case_id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, material_attr, material_spec, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, amount, `type`, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, is_delete, `status`) values (#{bomCaseId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialDesc}, #{materialUnit}, #{materialAttr}, #{materialSpec}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{tenantId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{status})

insert into pl_bom_node
bom_case_id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, material_attr, material_spec, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, amount, `type`, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, is_delete, `status`,
#{bomCaseId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialDesc}, #{materialUnit}, #{materialAttr}, #{materialSpec}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{tenantId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{status},
mapper.update: update pl_bom_node set bom_case_id = #{bomCaseId}, material_code = #{materialCode}, material_desc = #{materialDesc}, material_unit = #{materialUnit}, material_attr = #{materialAttr}, material_spec = #{materialSpec}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo}, logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName}, amount = #{amount}, `type` = #{type}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, is_delete = #{deleted}, `status` = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select parent.* from pl_bom_node child join pl_bom_node parent on child.bom_case_id = parent.bom_case_id where child.is_delete = 0 and parent.is_delete = 0 and child.material_code = #{materialCode} and child.logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo} and child.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and child.type = 1 and parent.type = 0 and parent.status = #{status}
mapper.insert:
insert into `pl_bom_node` (bom_case_id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, material_attr, material_spec, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, amount, `type`, status, tenant_id) values
(#{item.bomCaseId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialDesc}, #{item.materialUnit}, #{item.materialAttr}, #{item.materialSpec}, #{item.logicalPlantNo}, #{item.logicalPlantName}, #{item.amount}, #{item.type}, #{item.status}, #{item.tenantId})
mapper.select:
select
from pl_bom_node where is_delete = 0 and (tenant_id, logical_plant_no, material_code, type) IN
(#{item.tenantId}, #{item.logicalPlantNo}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.type})
